key_elements: Listed features: content generation, image analysis, recommendations, translation, pricing optimization
ready() method with commented signal registration template
Listed features: dashboard metrics, performance analytics, customer behavior, order statistics, revenue reporting
ready() method with commented signal registration template

patterns_discovered.description: Consistent structure for creating Django app stubs with both __init__.py and apps.py files
Each stub file includes detailed docstrings explaining current purpose and future implementation plans
Consistent use of BigAutoField as default_auto_field and prepared signal registration templates
Both apps.py files include commented-out signal import template ready for uncommentation when needed

gotchas_discovered.description: default_app_config is set in __init__.py files but is deprecated in Django 3.2+. While still functional, it may generate deprecation warnings in future Django versions.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Monitor Django version requirements and remove default_app_config when upgrading to Django 4.0+

gotchas_discovered.description: Signal registration is commented out and left for future implementation. If signals are added without uncommenting in ready(), they won't be registered.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Create signals.py modules and uncomment imports in ready() method when signals are implemented

gotchas_discovered.description: ready() methods contain only 'pass' which is acceptable for stubs but should be filled when actual initialization logic is needed
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Add actual initialization logic when implementing feature modules

approach_outcome.description: Successfully created stub Django applications for AI and Analytics modules with proper structure and documentation
deliverables: Created ai app with __init__.py and apps.py
Created analytics app with __init__.py and apps.py
Provided comprehensive docstrings documenting planned features
Established standard Django app configuration pattern
Set up signal registration templates for future use

recommendations.recommendation: Plan Django upgrade path - remove default_app_config from __init__.py files when Django version requirement becomes 3.2+
recommendations.rationale: default_app_config is deprecated and will be removed in Django 4.0

recommendations.recommendation: Create models.py, views.py, and serializers.py files as next step when implementing AI and Analytics features
recommendations.rationale: Stubs are ready; these are the typical next files needed for Django app functionality

recommendations.recommendation: Update project-level documentation with AI and Analytics app purpose and roadmap
recommendations.rationale: Docstrings are comprehensive but project documentation should reference these new modules

recommendations.recommendation: Create tests/ directory in each app with basic app configuration tests
recommendations.rationale: Ensures app configuration is correct before implementing features
